prd.oneLiner: Connect knowledge authoring, structured search, review and publishing, version and owner management, and usage analysis.
prd.goal: Convert 20% of repeated internal questions into searchable knowledge articles.
prd.whyNow: Work knowledge remains in personal chats and folders, making information hard for new teammates to find and answers repetitive.
prd.problem: Work knowledge remains in personal chats and folders, making information hard for new teammates to find and answers repetitive.
prd.solution: Connect knowledge authoring, structured search, review and publishing, version and owner management, and usage analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee finding or authoring work knowledge
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Work knowledge remains in personal chats and folders, making information hard for new teammates to find and answers repetitive.

targets.name: Knowledge-base operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Work knowledge remains in personal chats and folders, making information hard for new teammates to find and answers repetitive.

scenarios.text: Employee finding or authoring work knowledge completes article authoring and knowledge suggestion submission and checks progress.
Knowledge-base operations coordinator reviews search success, content freshness, and knowledge-usage reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Convert 20% of repeated internal questions into searchable knowledge articles.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Article authoring and knowledge suggestion submission
Article search, category, and freshness lookup
Review, publishing, version management, and feedback handling
Search success, content freshness, and knowledge-usage reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
